title: Department store revises process for collecting personal tax exemption information
summary: An individual went to the department store to make a purchase. When she identified herself at a checkout desk as being entitled to a provincial tax exemption, she was asked to write her personal information on a petition style form. To her dismay, she was able to see the names of other customers who had completed the tax exemption registe...
